title: Sqlitelogictest unavailable calc.- MAL operations
poc: CREATE TABLE tab0(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER);
SELECT - col0 - - - col0 * + CAST ( NULL AS INTEGER ) FROM tab0;
SELECT ALL - col1 * - 16 * + CAST ( NULL AS INTEGER ) FROM tab0 cor0;
key_bug_features: SELECT statements with NULL casting in calculations
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value1 INTEGER, value2 INTEGER, value3 INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES(1, 10, 20, 30), (2, NULL, 40, 50), (3, 60, NULL, 70);
SELECT value1 + CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) FROM test_table;
SELECT value2 * -1 + CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) FROM test_table WHERE value3 IS NOT NULL;
